tracked.outerHTML:
<select name="ctl00$ContentPlaceHolder1$ddl_Id" onchange="javascript:setTimeout('__doPostBack(\'ctl00$ContentPlaceHolder1$ddl_Id\',\'\')', 0)" id="ContentPlaceHolder1_ddl_Id" title="Provide suspect's ID Type if known to you" class="form-select">
	<option selected="selected" value="0">---Select---</option>
	<option value="1">Driving License</option>
	<option value="2">Email</option>
	<option value="3">Gov. Issued Card</option>
	<option value="4">Mobile Number</option>
	<option value="5">PAN Card</option>
	<option value="6">Voter Card</option>
	<option value="7">Other</option>
	<option value="8">Social Media Profile URL</option>
	<option value="9">Landline Call</option>
	<option value="10">International Call</option>
	<option value="11">WhatsApp Call</option>
	<option value="22">Bank Account Number</option>
	<option value="23">URL</option>

</select>

tracked.name: ctl00$ContentPlaceHolder1$txt_IdNo
tracked.outerHTML: <input name="ctl00$ContentPlaceHolder1$txt_IdNo" type="text" maxlength="10" id="ContentPlaceHolder1_txt_IdNo" title="Provide suspect's id number if known to you" class="form-control" autocomplete="off" onkeypress="return verifySpecileChar(event);" autocompllete="off" placeholder="999999999" style="">

tracked.name: ctl00$ContentPlaceHolder1$txt_AnyOtherDetails
tracked.value: Perpetrator operates through anonymous online accounts. Known handle/profile Not provided.
tracked.outerHTML: <textarea name="ctl00$ContentPlaceHolder1$txt_AnyOtherDetails" rows="2" cols="20" id="txt_AnyOtherDetails" title="Any other information of suspect which may be of help to police authorities during investigation" class="scanwid form-control" autocomplete="off" onkeyup="textCounter(this,'q17lengthtxt',250)" style=""></textarea>
